vocab.meaning: môi trường mộc mạc, không trang trí (để tránh xao nhãng)
vocab.example: I prefer an austere environment for revision because any decorative flair tends to pull my attention away from the text.

vocab.meaning: nơi trú ẩn yên tĩnh, thanh bình
vocab.example: The top floor of the university library is a true haven of tranquility, far removed from the hustle and bustle of the student union.

vocab.meaning: sự minh mẫn về nhận thức/tư duy
vocab.example: Studying by a large window with plenty of fresh air helps me maintain cognitive clarity during grueling cram sessions.

vocab.meaning: không gian làm việc chuyên dụng
vocab.example: I believe having a dedicated workspace is crucial for psychological priming, telling my brain it's time to focus.

vocab.meaning: được sắp xếp tỉ mỉ, ngăn nắp
vocab.example: I keep my study alcove meticulously organized so that I don't waste precious time fumbling for stationery.

vocab.meaning: sự biệt lập hoàn toàn (cách nói ví von về việc học một mình)
vocab.example: When a deadline is looming, I effectively put myself in solitary confinement in my bedroom to ensure I finish the task.
I’ve found that high ceilings and natural light foster productivity much better than cramped, dimly lit rooms.

vocab.meaning: sự im lặng tuyệt đối (như trong tu viện)
vocab.example: I gravitate towards the archives section where monastic silence is strictly enforced by the librarians.

vocab.meaning: mải mê, chìm đắm hoàn toàn vào cái gì
vocab.example: Once I’m at my favorite corner desk, I become so engrossed in my research that I lose all track of time.

vocab.meaning: không gian có bầu không khí nhẹ nhàng, không phô trương
vocab.example: The local bookstore has an understated ambiance that provides the perfect middle ground between home and a loud café.
